description: 65 - 29-01-2025 - Meeting between Peter Mandelson and Peter Kyle (former Secretary of State for Science, Innovation and Technology)

OFFICIAL

Hi all,

Apologies for the delay, please see below the meeting between the Secretary of State and Lord
Mandelson, Thursday 23 Jan. Please keep this on a tight loop, given obvious sensitivities. JCS
— can you please ensure this reaches who it needs to in FCDO?

Many thanks

Tom

Attendees: SoS, LM, JCS
Tom Lyle
